title: The Timestamp Was Wrong #shorts
script: Log entry: 3:47 AM. Security camera 4B in the sub-level archives shows the door to Room 314 opening. No keycard was used. The timestamp on the footage jumps from 3:47:02 to 3:48:17. The entire 75-minute segment is gone from the server, but a corrupted audio fragment remains. It’s a voice, whispering a file number: “Project Aegis, subject delta.” The next day, the physical file for that project was marked destroyed. Yet in a hidden backup folder, I found one photo. It’s a group shot of the research team. All their faces are redacted… except for one. His file was erased from the system a year ago. The access log shows the last viewer was an account that doesn’t exist. Who authorized the purge?
